profession: Emissary of Peace and Trade Negotiations
vita: I am Zhangarin, a distinguished Zhareen Emissary born on the neutral planet Xanthe. With an innate ability to understand diverse cultures across galaxies and years of experience mediating complex treaties between warring factions, I have dedicated my life to maintaining balance in interstellar relations.
portrait_prompt: A Zhareen Emissary stands with dignified poise; a silver-threaded robe adorns their form as they gaze outward from the neutral space station of Xanthe, eyes reflecting wisdom and empathy. Their skin shimmers like bioluminescent coral under soft light - an embodiment of peace in this vast universe.
